name: COGENT COMMUNICATIONS HOLDINGS, INC.
summary: PARTI Description of business We are a facilities-based provider of low-cost, high-speed Internet access, private network services, optical wavelength and optical transport services and data center colocation space and power. Our network is specifically designed and optimized to transmit packet-routed data.
